description.long: Explore the portfolio of Chandan Sharma, a full-stack developer and creative technologist specializing in interactive web experiences, Mobile Application, and innovative projects. Discover my latest work, including Coding Neural Micro Mini Finance, The Finance Pro, Krishco, and more. Let's build something amazing together!
description.short: Discover the portfolio of Chandan Sharma, a full-stack developer creating interactive web experiences and innovative projects.

experience.title: Full Stack Engineer
description: Developing scalable full-stack applications involved in complex systems.
Optimizing database performance and query efficiency.
Collaborating on architectural decisions and technical strategy.

experience.title: Freelance Developer
description: Delivered custom web solutions for diverse clients.
Managed full project lifecycles from design to deployment.
Maintained high client satisfaction through effective communication.

projects.title: Finance Pro
projects.description: A modern investment & finance management platform with responsive design, investment plan explorer, and user dashboard.

projects.title: My Portfolio
projects.description: A creative 3D portfolio website with interactive animations, Spline 3D elements, and a space theme.
